title: Two Sum
prompt: ## Two Sum\n\nRead two space-separated integers and print their sum.

title: Reverse a String
prompt: ## Reverse a String\n\nRead one line and print it reversed.

title: Palindrome Check
prompt: ## Palindrome Check\n\nPrint YES if input is a palindrome (case-insensitive).

title: Find Maximum in Array
prompt: ## Find Maximum\n\nGiven n integers, print the maximum.

title: Binary Search
prompt: ## Binary Search\n\nReturn the 0-based index of target in a sorted array, or -1.

title: Valid Parentheses
prompt: ## Valid Parentheses\n\nPrint YES if brackets in input string are balanced.

title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
prompt: ## Merge Sorted\n\nMerge two sorted arrays and print the result space-separated.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Chars
prompt: ## Longest Substring\n\nPrint the length of the longest substring with all distinct chars.

title: LRU Cache Simulation
prompt: ## LRU Cache\n\nProcess PUT/GET operations; print outputs of each GET.
